proof:
apply measurable_pi_iff.mpr; intro i
  apply measurable_pi_iff.mpr; intro j
  simp only [wignerMatrixMapScaled, wignerMatrixMap, Matrix.smul_apply]
  change Measurable (fun ω ↦ (1 / Real.sqrt (n : ℝ)) * wignerMatrixMap n ω i j)
  apply Measurable.const_mul
  exact measurable_pi_iff.mp (measurable_pi_iff.mp (wignerMatrixMapMeasurable n) i) j
successful_attempts:
apply measurable_pi_iff.mpr; intro i
  apply measurable_pi_iff.mpr; intro j
  simp only [wignerMatrixMapScaled, wignerMatrixMap, Matrix.smul_apply]
  change Measurable (fun ω ↦ (1 / Real.sqrt (n : ℝ)) * wignerMatrixMap n ω i j)
  apply Measurable.const_mul
  exact measurable_pi_iff.mp (measurable_pi_iff.mp (wignerMatrixMapMeasurable n) i) j
